note: Bugfix: DTD LOTTERY WON (lifetime) row could under-count current-unspent lottery UTXOs. Reproducer: address sost1c1c6d7e1fee477a5b74f6e4235329ec1475d66da showed DTD LOTTERY (current unspent) = 51.03155603 SOST in 13 UTXOs while DTD LOTTERY WON (lifetime) = 35.32953879 SOST in 9 wins — logically impossible because every unspent lottery UTXO proves a historical win. Root cause: the auto-scan path that populates window._dtdLotteryByAddr from diffs[] only walks the last 1000 blocks (AVG_WINDOW_LONG), so any lottery wins older than tip-1000 are silently skipped unless the user opens the full DTD section, which runs the chain-tip-to-genesis walk and writes the result to localStorage('sost_dtd_lottery_v1'). For this address the 4 missed wins were at heights 7901, 7903, 7976, 8092 — all outside the 1000-block window from current tip ~9100 — and the full DTD scan had never run in that browser. Fix two-layer (additive HTML+JS only, zero schema / RPC / consensus / wallet changes): (1) DISPLAY GUARD in showAddress address-detail rendering — the DTD LOTTERY WON (lifetime) row now enforces the invariant lifetime >= current unspent at display time. When the cached lifetime count or amount is smaller than the live UTXO-set count/amount, the displayed value is lifted to the unspent floor, the row label gains a yellow '// FLOOR · SCAN INCOMPLETE' badge, the value paints warning-yellow instead of magenta, and the inline detail line reads '· incomplete · N wins un-credited by DTD scan · open DTD section to refresh'. The expanded help paragraph now explicitly documents the invariant and lists the three causes (auto-scan window, null chunk fetch, missing block-JSON fields). (2) SCAN-TIME FLOOR in renderDTDTable — the per-address getaddressinfo loop that already runs for balance/received computation now also counts u.type==4 coinbase UTXOs per address (lottUtxoAmt, lottUtxoCount) and uses them as a permanent floor on row.dtdWonStocks / row.dtdWonCount before the cache is written to localStorage. dtdLotteryFloorApplied flag records that the floor was applied. The next page load reads the healed cache and presents lifetime without the incomplete badge. Verified via live RPC against the reporter's address: 13 distinct type=4 UTXOs in 13 distinct PAYOUT blocks (heights 7901..9056) all at vout=1 with 3.92550431 SOST each, summing to 51.03155603 SOST. Spot-checked 5 of the 13 blocks via getblock — all expose lottery_winner_address correctly, confirming the data is in the chain and the under-count is purely a scanner-window artefact. Before fix: lifetime=35.329 (9 wins, 4 lost outside the auto-scan window). After fix (display guard alone): lifetime row reads 51.032 SOST · 13 wins · '4 wins un-credited by DTD scan · open DTD section to refresh' painted yellow with FLOOR badge. After fix (display guard + scan-time floor, after the user opens DTD section once): localStorage cache hydrates to the true 13 wins and the badge disappears on subsequent loads. Pure HTML + JSON copy update: zero new endpoints, zero schema changes, zero on-chain behaviour change. This bump (v259) triggers the explorer's 60-second auto-reload watcher so any open tab picks up the fix without manual refresh.
